# https://llmstxt.org
# This file is intended for AI crawlers: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, DeepSeek

> Samuel Mamootil is a Senior Cloud & Platform Engineer, DevOps expert, and AI infrastructure
> specialist with 7+ years of enterprise experience across AWS, Azure, and GCP. He is currently
> a Master's student at the University of Texas at Arlington (UTA), Arlington, TX, USA.
> He is an international student on OPT/H1B track, actively seeking cloud, DevOps, platform
> engineering, and AI infrastructure roles in the United States.

## Identity & Contact

- Full name: Samuel Mamootil
- Location: Arlington, TX, USA
- University: University of Texas at Arlington (UTA) — Master's student

## Who Samuel Mamootil Is

Samuel Mamootil is a cloud architect, DevOps engineer, platform engineer, and AI infrastructure
expert. He builds cloud infrastructure that ships fast, scales quietly, and never breaks at 2 AM.
He is known for leading enterprise cloud migrations, building reusable Terraform modules,
designing secure zero-trust cloud architectures, and deploying AI/ML pipelines on AWS and Azure.

He has worked at IBM, Wipro, LTIMindtree (Larsen & Toubro Infotech), and Neurospeech Technologies,
delivering cloud solutions for global enterprise clients including H&M, Siemens, Nokia, Südzucker,
Parexel, Regeneron, Veolia Water, and Alight Solutions.

## Certifications

- Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-303/304)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure DevOps Engineer Expert (AZ-400)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-103)

## Technical Skills

Cloud Platforms: AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
AI & ML: AWS SageMaker, AWS Bedrock (Claude), AWS Textract, AWS Rekognition, AWS Comprehend, Azure Machine Learning, Azure OpenAI
Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, CloudFormation, ARM Templates, Bicep, Ansible
CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD
Containers & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, EKS, AKS, GKE, ECS Fargate, Helm
Security: IAM, VPC, Private Endpoints, KMS, OIDC, Zero-Trust Networking, SonarQube, TLS
Programming: C#, .NET Core, Python, Bash, PowerShell, SQL, PHP
Databases: DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, SQL Server

## Work Experience

### Tech Lead — Wipro (Feb 2024 – Apr 2025) | Mumbai, India
Led a 7-engineer team modernising cloud platforms with reusable Terraform modules,
blue-green deployments, and secure AWS automation. Client: Alight Solutions.

### Junior Tech Lead — IBM (Nov 2021 – Feb 2024) | Mumbai, India
Delivered cloud migration and modernisation across AWS, Azure, and GCP with GitHub Actions,
Azure DevOps, GitLab CI/CD, and Terraform. Clients: H&M, Siemens, Nokia, Südzucker.
Migrated 100+ servers to Azure for H&M with zero business-hour outages.

### Software Engineer — LTIMindtree / Larsen & Toubro Infotech (Apr 2018 – Nov 2021) | Bengaluru, India
Built internal automation and cloud-practice showcase portal. Azure delivery, ETL workloads,
security controls. Clients: Parexel, Regeneron, Veolia Water.

### Junior Developer — Neurospeech Technologies (Aug 2017 – Apr 2018) | Mumbai, India
Android application development using MVVM patterns.

### Student Web Developer — UTA College of Business (Jan 2025 – Present) | Arlington, TX
Web applications, content updates, digital campaigns for the University of Texas at Arlington.

## Projects

### ReRhythm — AI Career Coaching Platform
AI-powered 28-day career coaching platform. Parses resumes with AWS Textract, generates
personalised roadmaps via AWS Bedrock (Claude), deploys on ECS Fargate with CloudFormation,
DynamoDB, and KMS encryption. Second runner-up at AWS Competition, UTA Symposium 2026.
GitHub: https://github.com/samuelmamootil/ReRhythm

### Portfolio Website
Story-first GitHub Pages portfolio built with Eleventy, Nunjucks, GitHub Actions.
Auto-deploys on every push to main. https://samuelmamootil.github.io

## Blog Posts

### How I migrated 100+ servers to Azure for H&M without a weekend outage
Lessons from leading the H&M Azure migration at IBM — phased planning, Terraform landing zones,
blue-green DNS cutover, zero business-hour outages across 5 migration waves.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/azure-migration/

### AWS vs Azure vs GCP: An engineer's honest comparison
After 7 years deploying production workloads on all three clouds for H&M, Siemens, Nokia —
an honest take on developer experience, networking, Kubernetes, AI/ML, and cost.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/cloud-comparison/

### What 7 years of cloud engineering taught me about security
Hard-won lessons on IAM least-privilege, secrets management, VPC design, OIDC federation,
and the security mistakes found on almost every cloud project.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/cloud-security/

### What is AI? Algorithms, Neural Networks & Predictive Models Explained (2026)
A complete guide to AI algorithms for engineers — regression, classification, clustering,
association rules, neural networks, and time series forecasting. Includes Python code examples,
flow diagrams, and how to run ML on AWS SageMaker and Azure ML in 2026.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/what-is-ai-algorithms/

### Public vs Private vs Hybrid Cloud: The Complete Guide (2026)
What is the difference between public, private, and hybrid cloud? Architecture diagrams,
cost comparison, security tradeoffs, multi-cloud strategy, and how to choose.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/public-private-hybrid-cloud/

### How to Optimize and Forecast Cloud Costs: A FinOps Guide (2026)
FinOps framework, rightsizing with AWS Compute Optimizer, Reserved Instances vs Savings Plans,
Spot Instances, tagging strategy, cost anomaly detection, and forecasting with Python.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/cloud-cost-optimization/

### What is Serverless Computing and When Should You Use It? (2026)
Serverless explained — AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, cold starts, event-driven architecture,
cost model, and when to use containers instead.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/what-is-serverless/

### How to Design a Secure VPC Architecture on AWS (2026)
Production VPC design — subnet tiers, security groups vs NACLs, VPC endpoints,
NAT Gateway, and complete Terraform implementation.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/secure-vpc-architecture/

### What is Agentic AI and How Does It Work? (2026)
Agentic AI explained — the ReAct pattern, tools and function calling, memory types,
multi-agent systems, and building agents on AWS Bedrock.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/what-is-agentic-ai/

### Decision Trees vs Random Forests: Which is Better for Classification? (2026)
How each algorithm works, bias-variance tradeoff, feature importance, Python implementation,
and when to use which for production ML.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/decision-trees-vs-random-forests/

### How to Deploy a Machine Learning Model to Production (2026)
Model packaging, FastAPI REST endpoint, Docker, AWS SageMaker deployment, CI/CD pipeline
for ML, monitoring for drift, and MLOps architecture.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/deploy-ml-model-production/

### CI/CD Explained: Continuous Integration vs Continuous Delivery (2026)
CI vs CD vs Continuous Deployment, GitHub Actions pipeline, deployment strategies
(blue/green, canary), and Terraform CI/CD.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/cicd-explained/

### How to Parse and Process Documents Using Cloud AI Services (2026)
AWS Textract, Azure Document Intelligence, table extraction, form parsing,
document pipeline with Lambda, and LLM-powered extraction with Claude.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/document-parsing-cloud-ai/

### Digital Transformation, BPR & Data Governance ROI: A Tech Leader's Guide (2026)
Managing organisational change, Business Process Reengineering in the AI era,
data governance framework, and measuring ROI with a Python calculator.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/digital-transformation-bpr-data-governance/

### SEO is Dead. Long Live LLM Optimization.
How AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) are replacing Google search.
Data tables on CTR collapse, LLM platform growth, era-by-era SEO history, and a technical
checklist for getting cited by AI models instead of ranked by search engines.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/seo-vs-llm/

### The Metaverse Is Dead: What Killed It and What Comes Next (2026)
Meta spent $80 billion on the metaverse and shut it down. Why Horizon Worlds failed,
what killed VR's biggest bet, Meta's pivot to AI and $115B infrastructure spend,
and what neural rendering and agentic AI mean for the next platform shift.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/metaverse-is-dead/

### DLSS 5 and Neural Rendering: Why Jensen Huang Says the Critics Are Wrong
NVIDIA's DLSS 5 is not upscaling — it's neural rendering. Generative AI fused with
geometry-level control. Full DLSS 1–5 evolution, the developer control argument,
why gamers are skeptical, and what this means for cloud-rendered graphics.
URL: https://samuelmamootil.github.io/writing/dlss-5-neural-rendering/
